reviews.comment:
Los baños deben estar habilitados las 24 horas. Practicar la cordialidad no es un mal hábito.

(Translated by Google)
Restrooms should be available 24 hours a day. Practicing courtesy is not a bad habit.

reviews.comment:
No tienen para sumar puntos , ni para pagar con código QR

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a system for accumulating points, nor for paying with a QR code.

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio. Última estación antes de cruzar a Brasil.
Baños pequeños y no muy limpios.
En época de temporada alta, personas ofrecen cambio de moneda extranjera a precios muy convenientes en el exterior del recinto.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Last stop before crossing into Brazil.
Small and not very clean restrooms.
During peak season, people offer currency exchange at very convenient rates outside the station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcnF5MmhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) During my visit to the country, I always filled up at YPF gas stations. It was only at this particular store that I had a misunderstanding with the attendant because I didn't know they didn't fill up for Brazilians.

(Original)
Durante minha visita no país sempre abasteci na rede YPF , somente nessa loja tive um mal entendido com o frentista pois eu não sabia que não abastecia para brasileiros.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCN1BTcUR3EAE
